name: Hepatitis B Vaccine Codes (All Formulations)
description: CVX and CPT codes for hepatitis B vaccines including pediatric, adult, dialysis, and combination formulations. Used in childhood immunization status (CIS) measures. Requires 3-dose series (0, 1, 6 months) or 2-dose adult series with HepB-CpG adjuvanted vaccine.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
